design_philosophy: Radical minimalism inspired by Jony Ive. Remove all cognitive load. Strip unnecessary text/labels. Let the content breathe. The interface should disappear and the content becomes the experience itself. High emphasis on typography, whitespace, and optical clarity.

hierarchy.h1_paper_title: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-paper_text tracking-tight text-[#1D1D1F] leading-tight
hierarchy.h2_panel_word: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-ui_headings font-medium tracking-tight text-[#1D1D1F]
hierarchy.body_paper: text-lg sm:text-xl font-paper_text text-[#1D1D1F] leading-relaxed max-w-prose

layout_spacing.header: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 z-50 backdrop-blur-2xl bg-white/70 border-b border-black/5 flex items-center justify-between px-6 sm:px-12
layout_spacing.paper_container: max-w-3xl mx-auto pt-32 pb-32 px-6 sm:px-12 bg-[#FFFFFF] min-h-screen shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-none sm:rounded-3xl sm:my-8 sm:min-h-[calc(100vh-4rem)]
layout_spacing.side_panel: fixed top-0 right-0 h-full w-full sm:w-[400px] z-50 backdrop-blur-3xl bg-white/80 border-l border-black/5 shadow-2xl p-8 flex flex-col gap-6 transform transition-transform duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1)]
layout_spacing.empty_state: flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh] text-center max-w-md mx-auto space-y-8

killer_logo.description: A combination of a Lucide 'Aperture' or 'Focus' icon (stroke-width 1.5) next to 'Context Lens' in Manrope bold, tracking-tighter. Absolute simplicity.

icon_buttons.description: Replace text links with minimal stroke icons. Hover state adds a subtle soft background.
icon_buttons.classes: p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-black/5 text-[#1D1D1F] transition-colors flex items-center justify-center

clickable_word.description: Every word in the paper text. Invisible until hovered. Radical minimal feedback.
clickable_word.classes: inline-block cursor-pointer transition-colors duration-200 rounded-sm px-[1px] -mx-[1px]

upload_zone.description: Invisible until hovered, minimal dashed border or just an icon. Drag and drop area.
upload_zone.classes: w-full aspect-video rounded-3xl border border-black/10 border-dashed flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 hover:border-black/20 hover:bg-black/[0.02] transition-all cursor-pointer bg-white

bookmark_card.description: A bookmarked explanation in the library. Flush, no border, just a separator line.
bookmark_card.classes: py-6 border-b border-black/5 flex flex-col gap-2 last:border-0

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Use subtle background shifts (black/5) instead of scale transforms to maintain a serene, grounded feel.
motion_and_interactions.panel_slide: Use Framer Motion with ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] (Apple's signature spring/ease) for the side panel.
motion_and_interactions.fade_in: Content should gently fade in on load with a slight Y translation (y: 10, opacity: 0).

empty_state_texture.description: Use as a very subtle, low-opacity (10-20%) background image for the empty state or upload screen to give it an elegant, tactile feel.

workspace_ambient.description: Use in the marketing/landing area if needed, behind a glassmorphism overlay.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the UI using a pristine Light Theme. The background should be a subtle off-white (#F5F5F7) and the reading surface pure white (#FFFFFF).
Replace ALL text-based buttons (Upload, Bookmarks, Close) with high-quality Lucide icons to reduce cognitive load, as requested.
For the 'killer logo', use a Lucide 'Aperture' or 'Focus' icon paired with highly tightened typography ('Context Lens'). Do not use a generic image.
Use 'Newsreader' for the paper reading text and 'Manrope' for the UI and Headings. This creates a high-end editorial feel.
Ensure every word in the uploaded paper is wrapped in a clickable span. Use minimal visual disruption—only a slight background color change on hover/active (#E5E5EA).
The AI Explanation panel must feel like Apple's glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-3xl, bg-white/80). It slides in from the right.
